Content_Text: JETO Mini Body Camera, 1080P HD Wearable Action Camera with Touch Screen, Wide Angle, Magnetic Clip-On POV Cam, App Remote Live Stream (64GB Cycling Accessory Kit)

Ultra-Portable Action Camera & Wearable Design:Weighs just 1.58oz – clip on, hang, or mount anywhere with the magnetic pendant and 360° back clip. Perfect for hands-free travel, vlogging, biking, security patrols. You can record anytime, anywhere without the bulk.

True 1080P HD & 154° Wide Angle Video:Capture crisp 1080P footage and vibrant photos with a super-wide 154° FOV. Ideal for group selfies, action sports, pet POV, and security camera needs. You can fit more into every shot and never miss a moment.

Long Battery Life for Extended Recording:Up to 2.5 hours of continuous use per charge (with included lithium battery), plus fast USB charging for all-day reliability. You can document long events, daily commutes, or security shifts worry-free.

Portable & Wear-Anywhere Design:Ultra-compact and lightweight for easy carry and all-day use. Clip it to your shirt, bag, or gear, or wear it as a magnetic pendant—perfect for biking, travel, pet walks, and daily security. Grab it and record anywhere, anytime.

Waterproof Case & Full Accessory Kit – Ready for Any Adventure:Dive up to 30M with the waterproof housing. Includes magnetic pendant, back clip, helmet/bike mounts, USB cable & card reader. You can start shooting right out of the box—no extra purchases required.

Q: Can it record in low light? 
 A: The JETO Mini Body Camera can record in low light conditions with its 1080P HD sensor, though performance will vary depending on available lighting. It features 2K recording capabilities to help capture more detail in challenging lighting.

Q: Does it come with a remote control? 
 A: Yes, it comes with app remote control functionality via the JETO app (iOS/Android). Connects via Wi-Fi to start/stop recording, take photos, live stream, and preview footage.

Q: What is the storage capacity? 
 A: The JETO Mini Body Camera comes with 128GB built-in memory — no memory card is required.

Q: Is the touch screen responsive? 
 A: It features a 1.33" touch screen for easy navigation. Designed for intuitive operation to adjust settings, review footage, and control functions.

Q: Is it easy to mount on a bike? 
 A: Yes! Includes a complete cycling accessory kit: helmet/bike mount, 360° back clip, and magnetic pendant. Ultra-lightweight (1.58oz) for easy handling.
Movcan S70 Body Camera with Audio and Video Recording, HD 1520P Body Cam with 180° Rotating Lens, Thumb Size Hands Free Recording Body Worn Camera, Portable Camcorder for Work (64GB, Black)
【Thumb Size 】Thumb-sized dimensions 2.48 x 1.06 x 0.82 inches. Magnet Pendant, Safety Cord, and Portable Back Clip included.
【Full HD 2.7K Recording】2.7K/15FPS and 1080P/30FPS video modes. H.264 compression, 1.47-inch IPS display.
【180° Rotatable & Multi-Scene Mounting 】Horizontal 180° swivel lens, magnetic mount. Support record while charging.
【Dual-Mode WiFi & Real-Time Sharing】WiFi app control for live-streaming, playback, and settings adjustment.
【Complete Kit & Reliable Support】Includes body camera, 128GB storage (though title says 64GB, description says 128GB), USB cable, magnetic mount.

Q: Does it have night vision? 
 A: Not dedicated night vision, but uses BSI CMOS for better low-light performance. Records in 2.7K/1520P HD.

Q: Can it record while charging? 
 A: Yes, specifically supported for continuous recording.

Q: Is it easy to attach to clothing? 
 A: Yes, comes with portable back clip, magnetic mount, and thumb-sized design for discreet wear.

Q: What is the battery life? 
 A: Lasts for several hours; fully charges in about 30 minutes. Supports recording while charging.

Q: Is this camera waterproof? 
 A: No, specifications state 'Not Water Resistant'.
1. 广告宣传误导：实际收到的配件与图片不符，缺少展示的配件，仅有单机。
1. 极其便携：体积比预期还要小，非常容易携带。
2. 镜头可翻转：支持镜头翻转/调节，使用灵活。
1. 画质清晰且广角：1080P/2.7K清晰度高（可拍车牌），154°广角视野好。
2. 便携与安装便捷：磁吸/背夹/挂绳配件丰富，无需工具即可多场景佩戴。
3. 续航与存储：电池耐用（续航长），内置64GB大容量存储，支持直播功能。
1. 过热与系统死机：多名用户反馈机器在使用中发热极其严重，甚至导致初次使用时死机、无法正常关机。
2. App 连接与软件生态：手机 App 兼容性差（尤其是安卓新版本），连接不稳定，部分功能（如设置日期时间）强依赖 App 且无说明书。
3. 质量控制不稳：部分机器存在充电口腐蚀、电池续航远低于预期（如仅1小时）或必须插电才能使用的问题。
1. 独特 180° 旋转镜头：拇指相机配合可旋转镜头，使佩戴录制时取景角度极具优势，彻底解决了固定角度相机的盲区问题。
2. 磁吸挂脖与丰富配件：配备强力磁吸挂件及多种支架（单车、支架、管扣），磁吸稳固且支持多种创意拍摄场景。
3. 画质清晰与高清屏幕：在极小体积下提供了清晰的 1520P 录像，且自带的小屏幕亮度高、回放方便，音频录制在户外抗风噪表现好。

128G Thumb Action Camera, POV Camera Hands-Free Recording, Wearable Body Camera, Portable Vlogging with Touch Screen, Helmet Cam for Cycling, Motorcycle, Traveling, Tiny Size with 180° Rotating Lens
128GB Storage & Long Battery: This action camera has built-in 128GB (supports up to 256GB expansion). 800mAh+1600mAh battery supports up to 180 mins of continuous use, charging pod included.
Professional 180°Rotatable Lens & Touch Screen: 180° rotatable lens for every perspective. Responsive touch screen for adjustments and playback.
Full Waterproof & Rugged Design: Fully waterproof casing handles depths up to 30 meters (100 feet). Rugged build for all weather conditions.
Versatile Mounting: Magnetic lanyard, extra clips, and stable stand. Use as chest cam, head cam, or necklace cam.
Two Shooting Modes: Standalone recording via button or Smartphone WiFi link (32ft) for preview and sharing.
3-minute video: Automatic video segment saving every 3 minutes to prevent loss.
